# Lattice

> Open-source AI agent visualization dashboard

Lattice automatically scans project files and generates interactive graphs of multi-agent AI workflows. Supports CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Code, and custom setups. 11 parsers, no AI models used — pure regex-based scanning.

## Quick Start
npx lattice-agents ./your-project

## Key Features
- Interactive agent workflow graph with color-coded model families
- Workflow pattern detection (Sequential, Split & Merge, Operator, Agent Teams, Headless)
- Live agent monitoring with real-time status and log streaming
- Bidirectional editing — modify agent instructions from the dashboard with diff preview
- Cost tracking per agent based on model rates and runtime
- Agent health checks and git integration
- Export to PNG, SVG, Mermaid, JSON, Markdown table
- Team grouping with visual containers
- Auto-sync file watcher
- Dark/light theme, keyboard shortcuts
- 100% local — no API keys, no telemetry, no cloud

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/DahunHan/lattice
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/lattice-agents
